overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban plaza and narrow city streets. The player character moves past futuristic outdoor seating, food stands, and commercial buildings with heavy atmospheric fog and distinct cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza with futuristic neon seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza past futuristic outdoor seating and tables

entered.detail: circular tables with neon-lit chairs arranged in an open plaza
food stand with bright red and blue neon signage reading 'CIRIUS'
multi-story modern building with illuminated windows and cyan neon accents
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open plaza featuring futuristic round tables and neon-lit chairs. The CIRIUS diner is visible on the right with bright signage, while palm trees line the left side. A few NPCs sit at the tables in the foggy night atmosphere.

events.description: passing the CIRIUS diner and entering the covered area under the concrete overpass
large illuminated billboard comes into view on the right, casting bright light in the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass structure toward a building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera through the foggy corridor

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass spanning across the walkway above
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying a fashion image
glass entrance doors to the building at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving under a massive concrete overpass into a more enclosed space. A large digital billboard displaying an advertisement becomes visible on the right. The environment feels more urban and industrial with metal railings and concrete pillars lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial corridor with glass storefronts

events.description: entering narrow corridor with teal-lit glass greenhouse storefront on the left
passing a vending kiosk and bench with a seated NPC on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the illuminated glass storefront and vending area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on orange bench looking at their phone

entered.detail: large glass windows revealing an interior with plants and bright teal lighting
tall metal gate with horizontal slats illuminated by cyan neon lights
small automated vending machine booth with illuminated display
bright orange public benches along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow corridor between tall buildings, passing a striking glass storefront with teal interior lighting revealing plants inside. A vending kiosk and orange benches appear on the right, with an NPC sitting and using their phone.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy commercial street with approaching traffic

events.description: vehicle with bright headlights visible approaching in the distance through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing down the foggy street toward the approaching vehicle lights

notable_agents.action: vehicle with bright headlights approaching slowly through the dense fog

entered.detail: car with intense white headlights cutting through the fog
various shop fronts with colorful neon signage lining the street

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the misty street with the vending kiosk now on the left. A vehicle with intense headlights appears in the distance through the fog, slowly approaching. The street is lined with various neon-lit storefronts and scattered pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, neon-lit plaza into the claustrophobic, misty corridors of a futuristic city. It begins by gliding past round tables and palm trees in a foggy plaza, with the bright signage of the CIRIUS diner illuminating the right side of the path. As the camera moves forward, the open space gives way to a massive concrete overpass, shifting the atmosphere toward an industrial feel characterized by heavy pillars and a large digital billboard. The scene then tightens into a narrow corridor between towering buildings, passing a teal-lit glass storefront and orange benches before the path opens slightly into a misty street. Finally, the camera continues past neon storefronts as the intense headlights of an approaching vehicle pierce through the dense fog in the distance.
